title: US Pays Company to Stop Wind Energy
summary: The US government is giving $1 billion to a company called TotalEnergies to stop building wind farms in the ocean. This company had plans to make clean energy from wind, but now it will use the money to work on oil and gas projects instead. The deal means TotalEnergies won't try to build any more offshore wind farms in the US. Some people think this is strange because wind energy can help lower costs for families, but the government says it will make energy cheaper. The company had two big projects, including one that could power many homes. This decision might make it harder for states to get clean energy.

background_read: This article talks about a big decision by the US government to pay a company to stop making wind energy in the ocean. Wind energy is a clean way to make electricity without polluting the air. Companies like TotalEnergies had plans to build wind farms, but now they will focus on oil and gas, which can cause pollution. This might affect how states get their power and could change energy costs for families. It's important to understand how governments make choices about energy to protect our planet.
Article_Structure: WHO: The US government and TotalEnergies company
WHAT: The US pays $1 billion to stop offshore wind farm development
WHERE: In the US, especially near the Carolinas and New Jersey
WHY: To shift focus to oil and gas projects and possibly lower energy costs

perspectives.description: Thinks paying to stop wind farms will make energy cheaper for families
Believes stopping clean wind energy is bad for the planet and might not lower costs
